title: COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR - 211info
text: SOCIAL SERVICES DIVISION COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. (503) 650-5622 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8640 Main phone Main phone (503) 650-5622 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Extreme Heat Cooling Centers Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities Extreme Weather Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
